description: Terminal-first C.A.S.A recipes for governed software creation.

recipes.name: Create Web SaaS
recipes.summary: Generate a governed web SaaS path with frontend, API, database, security and validation steps.
steps: Create a mission and stack composition spec.
Generate the stack plan from the web SaaS preset.
Install dependencies only after reviewing the plan.
Create API contracts before shared endpoints.
Add authentication and authorization before exposing private routes.
Run typecheck, tests, security scan and dependency review.

recipes.name: Create Mobile App
recipes.summary: Generate an Expo mobile app path with backend, Supabase and mobile security checks.
steps: Select mobile routes and navigation boundaries.
Generate a mobile stack plan.
Decide which data can be stored on device.
Configure API and Supabase keys with environment separation.
Validate permissions, offline behavior and auth state transitions.

recipes.name: Create Desktop App
recipes.summary: Generate a Tauri desktop app path with React, SQLite and desktop security review.
steps: Define native capabilities and deny everything else.
Generate a desktop stack plan.
Plan local storage, signing and update channels.
Review filesystem, shell and network permissions.
Validate build and security gates before distribution.

recipes.name: Create Filament Admin
recipes.summary: Generate a Laravel Filament admin path with policies, database review and audit steps.
steps: Define panel users, roles and admin-only routes.
Generate the Filament stack plan.
Create model policies before exposing resources.
Add confirmation and audit logs for destructive actions.
Run authorization tests and security review.

recipes.name: Add OpenRouter AI
recipes.summary: Add OpenRouter model routing with env-only secrets, model config and AI safety checks.
steps: Generate OpenRouter config placeholders.
Choose default model and allowed fallbacks.
Validate model input and output boundaries.
Add cost, timeout, retry and rate-limit decisions.
Test provider errors and malformed model output.

recipes.name: Harden Web Security
recipes.summary: Apply a web/API security baseline with headers, rate limits, authorization and negative tests.
steps: List public endpoints and explicit authorization decisions.
Add validation, secure headers and rate limits.
Add negative authorization tests.
Review logs for token, prompt, cookie and PII leakage.
Run security-check and dependency review.

recipes.name: Setup Postgres Prisma
recipes.summary: Add Postgres and Prisma with migration, rollback and tenant-boundary review.
steps: Define tenant boundaries and sensitive data ownership.
Generate database stack plan.
Create migration and rollback notes before schema changes.
Add indexes for critical read paths.
Run migration tests or smoke checks.

recipes.name: Setup Supabase
recipes.summary: Add Supabase client posture with key separation, RLS review and negative policy tests.
steps: Separate publishable client keys from service-role keys.
List tables requiring RLS before release.
Generate Supabase stack plan.
Write negative tests for protected data access.
Capture policy review evidence.

recipes.name: Prepare Docker Deploy
recipes.summary: Prepare container deployment with env, health, rollback and smoke-test evidence.
steps: Identify runtime, build command, start command and health endpoint.
Create Dockerfile and compose files only after architecture review.
Keep secrets in environment or secret manager.
Add smoke tests and rollback notes.
Validate image build and health check.

recipes.name: Prepare Vercel Deploy
recipes.summary: Prepare frontend or fullstack deploy to Vercel with build, env and preview validation.
steps: Confirm framework, build command and output directory.
Map environment variables and mark secrets outside git.
Run local build before deploy.
Create preview deploy and capture URL.
Run smoke checks against preview before production.

recipes.name: Prepare Fly Deploy
recipes.summary: Prepare Fly.io deploy with secrets, health checks, logs and rollback evidence.
steps: Confirm Dockerfile or builder strategy.
Define secrets and regions.
Add health checks before production deploy.
Run deploy and inspect logs.
Capture rollback command and smoke-test result.
